name: Check of tabs at the top of the screen in LYRASIS
fullName: Catalog Navigation: Check of tabs at the top of the screen in LYRASIS

beforeStages.name: hooks.LoggerHooks.startScenarioLogger(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
Then  Account "LYRASIS Reads" is present on Accounts screen
And  There are types 'All', 'eBooks' and 'Audiobooks' of books on catalog book screen:
And  Section with books of 'All' type is opened on catalog book screen
Then  Section with books of 'eBooks' type is opened on catalog book screen
Then  Section with books of 'Audiobooks' type is opened on catalog book screen

afterStages.name: hooks.ScreenshotHooks.takeScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)

labels.value: Check of tabs at the top of the screen in LYRASIS
